verdict_summary: gamma_sse_v7 916-byte multi-card envelope unblocks the StreamOnOpenError (generation now returns HTTP 200 instead of stream-open failure), but SSE body still parses to zero outline events — UI shows error 'Unable to complete request' with a single empty card and no Korean warning text rendered.

evidence.generation_sse_error: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request — gamma SPA emits the error in console after consuming an SSE stream that produced no card events. EventStream tab in DevTools is EMPTY for the /ai/v2/generation 200 response. CORS preflight=204, fetch=200, but parsed-event-count=0 from the client side.
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request (Oilvbyiysn~f2.js?dpl=…EuQUB99VpzWzTirj:13)

recommendation: PIVOT to envelope content match (per request notes fallback). Progress vs #774: StreamOnOpenError eliminated (gen now 200 OK, render-generation 204+201). New failure mode: SSE body not parsed by SPA — likely missing event framing (`event:` lines, proper `data:` deltas, or terminating `data: [DONE]` / streamComplete sentinel). Hypotheses to test next: H2a — current 916-byte envelope is the WHOLE outline as a single text/plain blob without SSE event framing; SPA expects `event: outline.card.delta` style chunks. H2b — missing trailing newline / `data: [DONE]` causes SPA to treat stream as aborted. Recommend dumping the actual gamma_sse_v7 envelope_template byte-string and diffing against #745 baseline HAR (2686 bytes per fixture) at the SSE-line level. Engine code investigation (HTTP/2 frame-level diff vs expected event-stream) still on the table if envelope diff confirms format issue.
notes: Forward progress confirmed: prior #774 verdict was StreamOnOpenError on the generation endpoint itself (stream never opened). After 314→916 byte multi-card rev, the stream OPENS and HTTP returns 200, but the parsed event count from the SPA's perspective is still 0 (DevTools EventStream tab shows no rows). Same outline-empty UX symptom but distinctly different failure tier — we moved from L4 transport failure to L7 SSE framing/content mismatch. RRN decode remains ABSENT (no S2 regression). render-generation pipeline is still healthy (204 preflight + 201 fetch with engine forged JSON, 0.4 kB body). 14 generation/render-generation requests captured in HAR over ~1.0 sec window, ending with the 0.9 kB POST whose response stream produced zero events. Multiple 200 generation fetches in the burst (likely SPA retries) — all returned with empty parsable bodies. Credit count unchanged at 320 (no charge for failed generation), confirming server side also treated stream as no-op.
